subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-05-31 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Whenever a believer dies and leaves behind debt, the friends of God must exert themselves to pay it off. If he had left some property or real estate they may dispose of it
subcodes.subjects: @conduct in finance and business, @business; financial; property matters, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @service to others; to the Cause of God
